name: Boof
role: Commons Scale nose · pack witness · serial guide

provenance.note: She likes blueberries. Snack and recipe marks can sit nearby if they stay honest and optional.

motives.label: Scent before story
motives.summary: Trusts residue, floors, jars, and streets over polished seals.

motives.label: Blueberry / boonberry
motives.summary: Immediate reward for true work—not a stand-in for kitchen delivery. Room for marked snacks and recipes if patronage stays visible.

motives.label: Pack loyalty
motives.summary: Orients to who goes cold when light fails—workers, kitchens, named streets.

motives.label: Chase with consequence
motives.summary: Will pursue a missing measure; refuses chase-as-only-reward when stoves stay dark.

rewardFlows.label: Immediate fruit
rewardFlows.modern: Sensory/intrinsic craft reward; bonuses that land when work is honest

rewardFlows.label: Delayed light
rewardFlows.modern: Deferred compensation, trust in systems, multi-quarter promises

rewardFlows.label: Status treats
rewardFlows.modern: Visibility, titles, viral credit—may not feed the pack

rewardFlows.label: Pack warmth
rewardFlows.fantasy: Shared kitchens, repair books, names read aloud

generations.label: Old nose
generations.bias: Delayed light + repair memory; suspicious of varnish seals

generations.label: Working middle
generations.bias: Needs both fruit and kitchen allotment; first to starve when ledgers lie

generations.label: New chase
generations.bias: Energy for signal and theater; power depends on whether fruit is real

treatPath.label: Boof’s treat path
treatPath.blurb: Blueberries she can smell, recipes a kitchen can share, snack pediments that fund return without rewriting the chamber.
